intentSynonyms: search issues using jql in jira
description: Search for Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Supports filtering by project, status, assignee, labels, and more.

jql.description: JQL query string (e.g. "project = KAN AND status = 'In Progress'")

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 20, max 100)

start_at.description: Index of the first result to return for pagination
